title: Olabrian trichoid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|Eat. Cling. Reproduce. Survive.|translated=1|Thought process of an Olabrian trichoid|<ref name="The Truce at Bakura">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>}}
'''Olabrian trichoids''' were deadly [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] creatures native to the [[Olabria system/Legends|Olabria system]].

==Lifespan==
Trichoids generally laid pods containing three [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] into fruit, which would then be consumed by a higher life-form. After hatching in the host's [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]], the trichoid [[Larva/Legends|larvae]] would migrate to the host's respiratory system. After their [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]] were sufficiently developed, generally between 20 and 51 hours from infestation, they would begin to chew their way toward the richest available [[Blood/Legends|hemoglobin]] source, generally a major artery or the [[Heart/Legends|heart]].

At that point, the trichoid larvae would be roughly the size of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] finger, and could still be removed with a good chance for the host's survival. Once the larvae breached the heart, however, [[Death/Legends|death]] would occur swiftly. After gorging on blood, the larvae entered a pupal stage. Upon reaching maturity, the larvae exited the host's corpse ready to lay ten to twelve egg pods. Their entire life cycle required less than three weeks.

Trichoids could infest nearly any higher lifeform, and symptoms did not become apparent until the larvae began chewing through the host's tissue. The first sign of a larval infestation was a persistent cough. Death from severe hemorrhaging usually occurred within two hours of the onset of this cough.

Trichoids operated on pure instinct, with survival and reproduction being their only motivation. Trichoids had green and black striped bodies, with mouthparts at one end and an [[ovipositor]] at the other. Pure [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] was toxic to Olabrian trichoids, and could be applied to treat a trichoid infestation with rapid results.

==Biological weapon==
{{Quote|Don't worry, you're almost instantly curable-for about the next hour.|[[Wilek Nereus]]|<ref name="The Truce at Bakura" />}}
Olabrian trichoids were a favorite [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] tool of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakuran]] Governor [[Wilek Nereus]]. Though he was unsuccessful in causing a trichoid epidemic among the [[Ssi-ruu]]k via the captives they took for [[entechment]], he was able to infest [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and hoped that the Ssi-ruuk would keep Skywalker's body long enough for trichoids to escape into their shipboard population. If not for [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Skywalker would have been helpless to stop them. He directly contacted the parasites' primitive minds and tricked them into traveling up his trachea and out of his body. Nereus also infected [[Gaeriel Captison]], but she was later cured.

==Behind the scenes==
The life cycle of the Olabrian trichoid bears some similarities to the real-world malady known as [[Wikipedia:Trichinosis|trichinosis]].

==Appearances==
